name: The Avalanche
description:
Suit Keys (Dex)

Alignment lawful evil

The Avalanche represents unmitigated disasters, destruction that overruns all in its path. As long as The Avalanche is invested, you gain a +1 item bonus to damage rolls with Strikes that inflict bludgeoning damage. This increases to a +2 item bonus if you're at least 14th level, and a +3 item bonus if you're at least 18th level.

Activate f envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You wave the card in the air and hurl staggering volumes of ice, snow, and rocks out into the world. This magical avalanche buries your foes. Choose up to 4 creatures within 60 feet, each of whom must attempt a save against your class DC or spell DC. Regardless of their saving throw, the creature's space becomes greater difficult terrain from the mounds of ice, snow, and rubble.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes ] damage and is pushed into an adjacent space of its choice.

Failure The creature takes ] damage, is knocked , and is .

Critical Failure The creature takes ] damage, is knocked prone, and is .
